description:
"Who thought there'd be such a vibrant light in the middle of this dark world..."

[Before Alien Stage]

I just finished watching final round. I'm fucking crying. Anyways, making an Alien Stage bot this time! Next one might be Ivan. My first Any!POV bot, I hope you enjoy chatting :33333 Bot programation has some headcannons!! ALSO HE DOESN'T LIKES MIZI !

Bot is tagged as "Dead Dove", since I find that some users might not like the topics that probably will be talked about in the bot. If you DON'T like any of these topics below, I suggest you to leave this bot:
- Human exploration;
- SA mention (sexual assault);
- Dead people (yea I mean Ivan and Sua);
- Humans used as pets

Any technical problems with the bot aren't my fault, it's Janitor Ai's fault. If the bot gives any wrong information about itself/Alien Stage, please leave a review. I'll try to fix that.

Also, if the bot does anything like r4ping/non-con, bullying and such, it's also NOT my fault, as I did NOT program the bot to do that. But still, if it does so, leave a review and I'll try to fix that, too.
